services.section_subtitle: Research-backed AI and automation solutions for Swiss KMUs

automation.title: Agentic AI Consulting
automation.description: By 2028, 33% of enterprise software will include agentic AI, with 15% of work decisions made autonomously (Gartner 2025). The market is growing from $7B to $52B by 2030 at 46% CAGR. I design production-ready agentic systems using Claude, LangChain, and CrewAI - bringing enterprise-grade AI capabilities to Swiss KMUs at a fraction of enterprise costs.

business_automation.title: Business Automation (RPA)
business_automation.description: 53% of businesses have implemented RPA, achieving 30-200% first-year ROI with 12-month average payback (Deloitte 2024). RPA bots cost 1/3 of offshore and 1/5 of onshore FTEs. As a UiPath-certified consultant, I help Swiss KMUs automate repetitive processes - from invoice processing to customer service - reducing costs by 10-50% while improving compliance.

ai_workflows.title: RAG & Knowledge Systems
ai_workflows.description: 70% of enterprises now use RAG with vector databases to customize LLMs with proprietary data (Databricks 2024). Organizations report $3.70 return per $1 invested, with 70-90% reduction in AI hallucinations. I design intelligent knowledge systems that make your company's expertise instantly searchable and actionable.

consulting.title: Digital Transformation Strategy
consulting.description: Switzerland ranks 2nd globally in digital competitiveness, yet only 8% of Swiss SMEs use AI compared to 30%+ of large companies (digitalswitzerland 2024). 78% of organizations now use AI in at least one function (McKinsey 2025). I help KMUs develop clear AI roadmaps with measurable ROI - closing the gap with larger competitors.

about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: AI & Automation Consultant for Swiss KMUs
about.headline: Helping Swiss Businesses Close the AI Gap
about.bio1: I'm an independent consultant helping Swiss KMUs implement AI and automation solutions. With 13+ years of Fortune 500 experience, I bring enterprise-grade methodology to businesses of all sizes. My focus: making advanced AI accessible to Swiss SMEs who are often underserved by large consulting firms.
about.bio2: Previously, I led automation initiatives at Johnson & Johnson (2012-2024), developing AI-powered systems for global operations. I hold a Master's in Economics-Finance from the University of Aberdeen and am certified in UiPath RPA, Alteryx, and Power BI. Based in Grenchen, Switzerland, I also founded Taxed GmbH to bring automation expertise specifically to Swiss businesses.
about.highlight2: Based in Switzerland, serving Swiss KMUs
about.highlight3: Expert in Claude, LLM orchestration & RAG systems
about.certifications: UiPath RPA Developer • Alteryx Designer Core • Power BI Analyst • Claude & Agentic AI

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Common questions about AI consulting for Swiss KMUs

questions.question: Why should Swiss KMUs invest in AI now?
questions.answer: Only 8% of Swiss SMEs currently use AI, compared to 30%+ of large companies (digitalswitzerland 2024). Meanwhile, 78% of organizations globally now use AI in at least one function (McKinsey 2025). Early adopters gain competitive advantage - studies show 30-200% first-year ROI (Deloitte) with 12-month average payback periods.

questions.question: What ROI can I realistically expect?
questions.answer: According to Deloitte research, RPA implementations typically deliver 30-200% first-year ROI with 12-month average payback. Microsoft reports 3.5x average return on AI investments. Results vary by use case - I provide detailed ROI analysis before any project begins.

questions.question: How do you ensure Swiss data protection compliance?
questions.answer: All implementations follow Swiss DSG and GDPR requirements. I prioritize Swiss-hosted or on-premise solutions where required. For AI systems, I implement proper data governance, audit trails, and human-in-the-loop controls to ensure compliance with Swiss regulatory standards.

questions.question: What's the typical project timeline?
questions.answer: Initial automation assessments take 1-2 weeks. Implementation projects range from 4-12 weeks depending on scope. I recommend starting with a focused pilot (4-6 weeks) to demonstrate value before scaling. Every engagement includes knowledge transfer so your team can maintain systems independently.

questions.question: Is AI affordable for smaller businesses?
questions.answer: Yes. RPA bots cost 1/3 of offshore and 1/5 of onshore employees (Deloitte). Cloud-based AI tools offer pay-as-you-go pricing. I specifically focus on Swiss KMUs - designing solutions that fit SME budgets while delivering enterprise-level capabilities. Typical starter projects begin under CHF 10,000.

questions.question: What technologies do you specialize in?
questions.answer: I specialize in agentic AI (Claude, LangChain, CrewAI), RPA platforms (UiPath certified), RAG systems with vector databases, and custom AI workflows. I select technologies based on your specific needs - prioritizing Swiss-hosted options and solutions with strong data governance.

questions.question: Do you provide training for our team?
questions.answer: Absolutely. Every engagement includes comprehensive knowledge transfer and documentation. I ensure your team can maintain and expand automation solutions independently. This empowers your organization to continue driving AI adoption after the initial project.

questions.question: How do I get started?
questions.answer: Contact me for a complimentary automation assessment. We'll discuss your business challenges, identify high-impact automation opportunities, and develop a realistic roadmap with clear ROI projections. No obligation - just practical advice on where AI can help your Swiss business.
